subject: RAM for Warp/M
body:
Dear Warp community,

We are building a machine for Cryo-ET analysis and I was wondering if the 
128GB RAM is enough for Warp/M use? And if not in which cases I will need 
more RAM? We are a bit tight on the budget and I am trying to understand 
what is the minimum we can work with at the moment.

Thank you so much for your help,
Karine
